page: OVHcloud c3-256 is a compute-optimized server powered by an AMD EPYC Milan processor utilizing the x86_64 architecture. It features 128 dedicated physical cores and 128 vCPUs, operating at a base clock speed of 2.3 GHz with no hyperthreading. The hardware configuration includes 256 GB of RAM, providing 2.0 GB of memory per core, alongside a 400 GB local NVMe SSD and a baseline network bandwidth of 20 Gbps.

In benchmark evaluations, the server demonstrates top-tier multi-core performance, placing in the top 10% for stress-ng multi-core CPU testing, PassMark CPU scores, and multi-threaded bzip3 decompression. Memory performance is highly polarized, with cached small-block read-only bandwidth reaching top-tier levels, while large-block uncached read bandwidth remains in the average tier. Cryptographic capabilities and software compilation tasks also rank in the top 10%, while single-core performance and database operations consistently fall within the top 25%.

The dedicated core allocation and high compute-to-memory density offer strong qualitative cost efficiency for parallel processing workloads that do not require massive memory footprints. However, the 2 GB of RAM per core represents a tradeoff for memory-intensive databases or large-scale LLM text generation, where performance falls to average levels. This server is best suited for compute-heavy workloads such as software compilation, ray tracing, cryptography, high-throughput web serving, and multi-threaded data processing.
description: OVHcloud c3-256 is a compute-optimized server featuring 128 dedicated AMD EPYC Milan physical cores and vCPUs on the x86_64 architecture. Operating at 2.3 GHz with a 1:1 thread-to-core ratio, it is equipped with 256 GB of RAM, a 400 GB NVMe SSD, and 20 Gbps baseline network bandwidth. Benchmark data highlights top-tier multi-core CPU performance, software compilation, and cryptography, alongside strong single-core and database execution. While cached memory bandwidth is exceptional, uncached large-block reads and LLM text generation operate at average speeds, reflecting a tradeoff of its 2 GB memory-per-core ratio. This instance is highly effective for parallel processing, software compilation, ray tracing, and high-throughput web serving.
og_description: OVHcloud c3-256 is a compute-optimized server featuring 128 dedicated AMD EPYC Milan cores, 256 GB RAM, and a 400 GB NVMe SSD, delivering top-tier multi-core CPU and compilation performance.
meta_description: OVHcloud c3-256 is a compute-optimized server with 128 dedicated AMD EPYC Milan cores, 256 GB RAM, and 20 Gbps network bandwidth.
tagline: A dedicated 128-core compute platform delivering top-tier multi-threaded processing, cryptography, and software compilation performance with local NVMe storage.
bullet_points: 128 dedicated AMD EPYC Milan physical cores with no hyperthreading
256 GB of system memory and 400 GB of local NVMe SSD storage
Top-tier multi-core CPU, software compilation, and cryptographic performance
20 Gbps baseline network bandwidth with KVM virtualization
Optimized for parallel processing, ray tracing, and high-throughput web serving
